allow: Bash(git tag -a v3.14.0-test1 -m "测试 Windows 构建工作流 - build_windows CI 验证")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''Run #{r[""id""]}: {r[""status""]} | {r[""conclusion""]} | {r[""event""]} | {r[""display_title""]}''\) for r in data.get\(''workflow_runs'',[]\)]")
